creator: george@m5p.com
text: When playing my test file, in my terminal window, the audio time goes up for about fifteen seconds while the video time stays stuck at 0.8.  Then video time finally starts going until it almost catches up, then it gets stuck again.  Audio time continues running smoothly, but I also get a warning about "Too many video packets in the buffer" and I get the suggestion to use the "-ni" option.
